allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', p.get\('version'\)\); print\('deps:', json.dumps\(p.get\('dependencies',{}\), indent=2\)\); print\('peer deps:', json.dumps\(p.get\('peerDependencies',{}\), indent=2\)\)")
